children.name: hwWlanNaviACStationTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandStatisTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandStatisEntry
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCPECommandStatusTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanStationTable
children.description: This table is used to describe access information about STAs.The index of this table is hwWlanStaMac.

children.name: hwWlanStationEntry
children.description: The index of this table is hwWlanStaMac.

children.name: hwWlanStaAuthSuccessTime
children.description: This object indicates the auth success time of the station.

children.name: hwWlanStaRssi
children.description: This object indicates the received signal strength indicator (RSSI) of a STA.

children.name: hwWlanStaAssocSuccessTime
children.description: This object indicates the association success time of the station.

children.name: hwWlanStaVlan
children.description: This object indicates the VLAN connected to users.

children.name: hwWlanStaNoise
children.description: This object indicates the noise from a connected STA.

children.name: hwWlanStaMac
children.description: This object indicates the MAC address of a STA, which identifies the STA and functions as the index for querying information associated with the STA.

children.name: hwWlanStaGateway
children.description: This object indicates the user gateway.

children.name: hwWlanStaSnrUs
children.description: This object indicates the upstream SNR of the STA (AP measured), in 0.1 dB. Special value 0x7FFFFFFF indicates that the value exceeds the threshold and 0x7FFFFFFE indicates that the value cannot be obtained at present.

children.name: hwWlanStaAccessChannel
children.description: This object indicates the channel connected to users.

children.name: hwWlanStaAssocBand
children.description: This object indicates the frequency band where users reside.	2.4G(1): 2.4G frequency band  5G(2): 5G frequency  band 6G(3): 6G frequency band.

children.name: hwWlanStaRfMode
children.description: This object indicates the user radio mode.

children.name: hwWlanStaOS
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanStaSsid
children.description: This object indicates the SSID assocaited with the STA.

children.name: hwWlanStaGatewayIPv6
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCpeTunnelRemoteStationInfoTable
children.description: Description.

children.name: hwWlanCpeTunnelRemoteStationInfoEntry
children.description: Description.
